backlog.title: Add unit tests for src/app.module.ts
backlog.goal: Ensure the application module is robust and free of bugs.
backlog.why: This will improve code quality and make future changes less risky.

backlog.title: Refactor monitoring utility to improve readability
backlog.goal: Make the monitoring utility easier to understand and maintain.
backlog.why: This will enhance developer experience and simplify future updates.

backlog.title: Add integration tests for caching mechanism
backlog.goal: Ensure the caching mechanism works as expected under various conditions.
backlog.why: This will improve system reliability and user experience.
backlog.commit_message: feat: add integration tests for caching service
